title: Activate $1K Google Cloud credits
detail: gcloud auth login → set project → enable Vertex AI API. $1K credits = ~666M tokens Gemini 2.0 Flash.

title: Export GOOGLE_API_KEY from aistudio.google.com
detail: google-genai 1.65.0 already installed. Omni-pipeline auto-activates google_ai provider when key is set. Free 1M tokens/day.

title: Wire Redis as LLM response cache
detail: Redis is RUNNING (PONG). Cache identical prompts → skip API calls entirely. 2-5x effective throughput multiplier. Use as dedup layer in smart_llm_call().

title: Fix Grok CLI (410 live_search deprecation)
detail: @vibe-kit/grok-cli@0.0.34 sends deprecated live_search param. Either: npm update, find official xAI CLI, or patch the package to remove live_search. PATCHED: commented out search_parameters in client.js. Now 400 (API key) instead of 410.

title: Fix Grok API credits (429 exhausted)
detail: xAI API credits exhausted on team 2dd5cee8-... SuperGrok CLI sub is separate from API credits. Need to purchase API credits or wait for refill.

title: Wire real implementations into hyper_poly_swap.py slots
detail: Current file has stub implementations. Wire actual SQLite/Qdrant/Redis storage, actual CLI agents (Claude/Gemini/Codex/Grok), actual SearXNG search. Connect to existing omni-pipeline.

title: Spin up vLLM in Docker
detail: Docker is running. vLLM is 2-4x faster than Ollama for batch inference. docker run vllm/vllm-openai with local models.

title: Wire Kilo Code extension as compute provider
detail: kilocode.kilo-code-5.11.0 installed in Antigravity. Free autonomous AI coding agent with its own quotas. Can edit files, run terminal, execute code.

title: Wire ChatGPT/Codex extension in Antigravity
detail: openai.chatgpt-26.323.20928 installed in Antigravity. 'Included in ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Business'. Separate quota from codex CLI.

title: Set up GitHub Actions for batch inference
detail: GitHub account DamianWnorowski. 2000 min/mo free compute. Run Ollama in Docker for batch DPO generation offloaded to cloud.

title: Check GitHub Copilot availability
detail: gh CLI installed and authenticated. Check if Copilot is included with account plan. gh copilot suggest/explain for quick tasks.

title: Restore Omega source from .git.backup
detail: Mass secret replacement corrupted 6000+ .rs files. Omega can't compile. Restore from .git.backup, verify build, repush.

title: Fix 118 corrupted bin/ scripts
detail: Mass REDACTED_SECRET replacement corrupted 118 scripts in bin/. Restore from backup.

title: Repush GitHub repos after restoration
detail: 4 repos were pushed with corrupted source. Need to force-push clean versions after restore.

title: AION equilibrium false positive — add weighted quorum
detail: AION reports Equilibrium: True while 3 cognitive daemons are DOWN. 200+ passive monitors dilute quorum. Need cognitive daemons to carry 100x weight in src/aion.py.

title: Knowledge graph write lock — prevent concurrent clobber
detail: knowledge_graph_local.json is flat JSON, full read-rewrite on every update. Multiple daemons write concurrently. Need file lock (fcntl.flock) or switch to SQLite.

title: CTE→Omega DPO synapse — automate post_pretrain_pipeline.sh
detail: Synapse documented as PARTIAL. harvest runs but post_pretrain_pipeline.sh is manual-only. With DPO velocity=0 for 8+ hours, reactive trigger never fires.

title: Add source field to ALL DPO pairs
detail: brain_dpo has pairs from 30+ sources but some lack source field. At entropy=0.50, can't filter by source quality without tagging. Need per-source entropy tracking.

title: Integrate NOELLE ALEK architecture with Ouroboros
detail: User shared architecture diagram (photo.png). Full cognitive agent system: Perception Engine, Security & Autonomy, Interface Systems, Core reasoning. Several concepts overlap with Ouroboros. Compare and integrate.

title: View Grok shared link from user
detail: User shared https://grok.com/share/c2hhcmQtMw_22ffd326-40e4-402c-93e4-7896b4e14df4 — never viewed. Need to fetch and integrate.

title: Deploy AI endpoints on Vercel/Netlify (free compute)
detail: Both have MCP servers active. Vercel: AI SDK + serverless + edge. Netlify: 125K function invocations/mo free. Can deploy inference endpoints.

title: Wire Supabase edge functions + pgvector
detail: Supabase MCP configured. Free PostgreSQL + pgvector (supplement Qdrant) + edge functions (Deno serverless compute) + realtime CDC.

title: Build auto-usage-optimizer daemon
detail: Daemon that continuously rebalances across providers based on live budgets. When Claude hits 80%, auto-routes to Gemini/Ollama. When Gemini hits RPM limit, routes to Codex. Runs as reactive watch.

title: Autotask queue drain mechanism
detail: Queue deduped from 168K to 11 and capped at 500. But no EXECUTION mechanism — queue grows, nothing drains it. Need separate executor decoupled from brain daemon.

title: Disk pressure monitoring in reactive engine
detail: autotask_log.jsonl 163MB, no rotation/TTL/compaction. Reactive daemon watches content changes but not disk usage. Need threshold monitor for disk pressure with auto-compaction.

title: Calibrate Claude usage tracker against /usage
detail: Current 43M limit estimate conflicts with 448M effective seen in check_usage.py. Multiple parallel sessions (Gemini-spawned) inflate numbers. Need to match exactly what /usage reports by isolating THIS session's tokens vs all sessions.

title: Fail-deadly Ollama fallback in smart_llm_call
detail: Pillar Lens: hardcoded direct Ollama bypass if all UCB1 providers fail. In src/__init__.py.

title: Tier 0 immutable axioms in temporal_memory
detail: Serpent Lens: pin_axiom() + get_axioms() + tier0 tier. 5 core axioms seeded.

title: Speed+locality bonus in UCB1 reward function
detail: Scale Lens: speed_bonus (0-30s→1.0-0.0) + locality_bonus (0.2 for local Ollama). In smart_llm_call().

title: Knowledge graph file lock (fcntl.flock)
detail: Fracture F16: _save_graph() now uses flock + atomic tmp→rename. Prevents concurrent clobber.

title: Polynested preset module
detail: src/polynested_preset.py — 9x9 synergy matrix, eigenmode, gates, provenance, 10-lens. Gemini-built.
